errors.message: Contract code size is 46368 bytes and exceeds 24576 bytes (a limit introduced in Spurious Dragon). This contract may not be deployable on Mainnet. Consider enabling the optimizer (with a low "runs" value!), turning off revert strings, or using libraries.

documentation.text:
@title MemeLaunchFactory
 @notice Launches meme tokens with bonding-curve pools and auto DEX graduation.
@notice Launch live on Uniswap immediately while keeping a graduation target on the live pair.
@notice Klik-style launch: deploy and migrate directly to Uniswap using provided ETH.

documentation.text:
@title MemePool
 @notice Bonding-curve pool that auto-migrates liquidity to DEX at graduation threshold.
@notice Allows anyone to trigger migration if target is reached.
@notice Factory-only path to skip bonding curve and migrate immediately to DEX.
@notice Factory-only path to seed Uniswap immediately but keep a live graduation target on the pair.
@notice Factory-only path to open a Uniswap V3 single-sided live curve with no creator ETH seed.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (struct IUniswapV3PositionManagerLike.MintParams memory) payable external returns (uint256,uint128,uint256,uint256)

@title MemeToken
 @notice Minimal ERC20 used by the meme launcher factory.
@notice Irreversibly removes any factory-level control hooks.
